title: BRIO | Shiny Tools [3D Tools] [COPPER AGE UPDATE]
description: Bring some brio to your world! With tools redesign.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115aafba7cec5049b5258ac83a9b7b9e7bfa06ad.png)

# [CHECK ALSO 3D WEAPONS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brio-shiny-blades)

**DESCRIPTION**

[Model gap fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) reccomended

That pack is a complete tools redesign with new 3D models. All in one style, that fits vanilla perfectly. Each tool developed as an unique piece with his own special features. 

Main feature of this RP is 2D GUI icons of items, but 3D models in hands and frames. Each item have its own unique display position in item frame, so that they can be not only an "item in frame", but actually a nice decoration.

- High quality, stylish, detailed Vanilla-like 16x16 resourcepack
- 2D GUI icons
- 3D models in hand
- Unique item frames display for each item
- Unique display if equipped in helmet slot

![Copper sword and tools](https://i.ibb.co.com/CpgCtCxr/mainpage-pixelated-c.png)
![Rods](https://i.ibb.co.com/LzThHtZ3/rods.png)
![2D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bef656a48dbad1bd6cac6c205d81aa9e34579b4f.png)![3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294ec198c0bef7bcb73dacec4ca75ebea0407632_0.webp)

<details>
  
  <summary>PLANS</summary>
- Animations
- Other tools redesign
- Some retexture
- Visible damage and enchantments
- Hold my items support

</details>
